channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Trump Says He’ll Sign Order to Pay TSA
item.description: "It is not an easy thing to do, but I am going to do it!" wrote Trump.

item.title: Razer Blade 16 : quoi de neuf sur une des références des PC portables gaming
item.description: Le design ne bouge pas. Mais sous le capot, le Razer Blade 16 (2026) change tout. En passant chez Intel avec l'architecture Core Ultra 9 386H, Razer promet un bond d'efficacité inédit pour un laptop gaming. De quoi faire trembler Apple sur le terrain de l'autonomie.

item.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has a new poster — and fans are foxed by the decision to reveal a major spoiler
item.description: Super Mario fans are not happy with a huge spoiler being included in a new poster for the movie.

item.title: No ice, no problem — turn anything into a frozen drink with the Ninja Slushi, now $150 off
item.description: Get a taste of summer early with the Ninja SLUSHi Professional Frozen Drink Maker, on sale now for $199.99 (reg. $349.99).

item.title: File your own taxes for $35 with help from H&R Block
item.description: Conquer your taxes on your own with this H&R Block Tax Software Deluxe and State 2025 for Windows and Mac online code for only $34.99 (reg. $59.99) now through April 12.

item.title: Google Gemini now lets you import your chats and data from other AI apps
item.description: Google is adding a pair of new features to Gemini aimed at making it easier to switch to the AI chatbot. Personal history and past context are big components to how a chatbot provides customized answers to each user. Gemini now supports importing history from other AI platforms. Both free and paid consumer accounts can use these options. With the first option, Gemini can create a prompt asking a competitor's AI chatbot to summarize what it has learned about you. The result might include details such as your typical written communication style, your family members' names or your key preferences...

item.title: I found 22 noise-cancelling headphones to shop during the Amazon Spring Sale — ANC headphones start at $42
item.description: During the Amazon Big Spring Sale, you can grab noise-cancelling headphones starting at $42. Plus, grab Sony headphones for 46% off.

item.title: Robot vacuums from Eufy and Roborock are over 50 percent for Amazon’s spring sale
item.description: A good robovac can save you a surprising amount of time. Luckily, Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is a great time to pick one up, as you can currently find deals on everything from basic, budget-friendly robovacs to high-end models that can mop or pick up objects. Whether you’re looking for a completely hands-free experience or […]

item.title: Apple discontinues the Mac Pro
item.description: Apple has confirmed to Engadget that the Mac Pro, the desktop tower-shaped computer that was last updated in 2023, has been discontinued. As 9to5Mac notes, the computer no longer appears in the lineup of Macs on Apple's website or in its storefront. That means at least for now, the Mac Studio is the Apple's top-of-the-line professional computer.The current version of the Mac Pro was introduced in 2019, with a distinct cheese-grater design, Intel chips and a bevy of easily-accessible expansion slots. Apple released the computer as a make-good for several years of inadequately meeting the perfor...

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale is surprisingly good: We found 111+ deals on Apple, DJI, Sony, and Dyson
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back from March 25 to 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and grab Kindles for $95.

item.title: Apple’s Mac Pro is dead, apparently for good this time
item.description: The most expensive Mac you could get is no longer available on Apple's website, as 9to5Mac reports that the "cheese grater" Mac Pro workstation has been discontinued. It had been a part of the lineup since replacing the Power Mac G5 in 2006 when Apple shifted from Arm to Intel processors, but it's had the […]

item.title: 'A dream come true': Revolutionary AI smart glasses win $1.4 million ‘Nobel Prize’ to combat dementia
item.description: AI smart glasses win major funding to support dementia care, though real-world effectiveness and long-term impact remain uncertain despite early promising observations.

item.title: Empty nester women: The new targeting market?
item.description: Marketers have a growth opportunity with this increasing, overlooked segment. There’s a tremendous, ageless opportunity hiding in plain sight, but marketers need to look through a different lens to see it. Right now, there are some 35 million U.S. empty nester women, as I calculate it, and a growing percentage of them are single. They aren’t retreating into rest and relaxation; they are stepping out to exult in activities they finally have the time, money, and motivation to pursue. ...

item.title: Apple arrête le Mac Pro
item.description: Apple débranche le Mac Pro. La grande tour en aluminium, qui n'avait pas été mise à jour depuis 2023, est sortie en catimini du catalogue du constructeur. C'est le Mac Studio qui prend une bonne fois pour toute la place de ce Mac emblématique… mais dépassé.

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026: Live updates on Apple, Kindle, DJI, and Brooklinen deals
item.description: Get live updates on the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026. We found record-low prices on Apple MacBooks, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony XM6 headphones, and more.

item.title: Deadpool Will Deface ‘Magic: The Gathering’ Classics for a New Secret Lair
item.description: Just in time for the most annoying of holidays, Deadpool will continue Marvel's advance into 'Universes Beyond' with a bit of graffiti.

item.title: 'The 'engineering of addiction' explained — 3 ways Meta and YouTube have harmed young users, according to the landmark case
item.description: The science of smartphone addiction, according to the landmark Meta-Google ruling.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The best Lego deals from Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on Star Wars and Super Mario
item.description: Shop the best Lego deals during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
item.description: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

item.title: Google is making it easier to import another AI’s memory into Gemini
item.description: After Anthropic updated its tool for copying another AI's memory into Claude earlier this month, Google Gemini is rolling out new "Import Memory" and "Import Chat History" features on desktop that can help users quickly copy over everything their current AI already knows about them. To use the "Import Memory" tool, users copy and paste […]

item.title: How Trump’s Plot to Grab Iran's Nuclear Fuel Would Actually Work
item.description: Experts say that an American ground operation targeting nuclear sites in Iran would be incredibly complicated, put troops’ lives at great risk—and might still fail.

item.title: Apple’s Siri Isn’t Just Going to Use One Chatbot. It’s Going to Use All of Them
item.description: Why choose if you don't have to?
